review_title: Pending my projects from my comfortable sofa
author: Jeniriana R.
pros: Connect Oasis allows me to be aware of each of my projects in real time, as well as gather information about field conditions, analyze the plan, and finally execute the project until its completion, thus obtaining good results.
cons: It has a wide range of tools, which allows me to create successful projects, I recommend those who want to have control in their hands.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Didi G.
pros: The product has edits to help move through the program with correct and complete information.
cons: It is very time consuming, and many nurses procrastinate entering the data.

author: Jeanne B.
pros: It saves time and paper. Data can be entered and saved.
cons: It is very confusing to use. Isn't designed to use at remote location. Multiple versions of same forms but they cannot be used interchangeable. Lack of software support.

review_title: OASIS - easy to use restaurant pos
author: Mark R.
pros: Easy to use tools. It can handle discounts automatically and quick menu changes.
cons: Cost of the tools and equipment. Also, IT suppoort periodically.

author: Richard G.
pros: The software is relatively easy to navigate, and the support is great.
cons: To the best of my knowledge, it cannot be installed on a server.

author: James H.
pros: I like the cost, and it is relatively easy to troubleshoot given its use.
cons: Not many people around here use it regularly, so getting insights into it is hard.

author: Gil Y.
pros: We use OASIS as an informational system for our vehicle management system.
cons: It can be complex to navigate until you become familiar with its features
